steps.label: Question
steps.title: What if any wall could give you something?
steps.meaning:
What if any wall could give you something?

Mint for breakfast.
Basil for dinner.
Flowers for the room.

No garden.
No mess.
No complicated care.

A beautiful wall with a hidden function.

steps.label: Feeling
steps.title: I want life closer.
steps.meaning:
I want life closer.

Not somewhere far away.
Not in a field.
Not at the dacha.
Not as a garden I have to visit.

Within reach.
Near the morning cup.
On the wall beside me.

Fresh, small, alive.
Part of the day.

steps.label: Imagination
steps.title: Impossible systems appear.
steps.meaning:
Before the brief, there is imagination.

Roots in water.
Light above leaves.
A loop that keeps life growing.

Then the garden escapes the table
and starts climbing the wall.

Some images are strange.
Some are too technical.
Some are too beautiful to ignore.

One of them becomes the task.

steps.label: Frame
steps.title: The vision becomes a brief.
steps.meaning:
Now the image has to obey reality.

Wall. Hex. Water. Light. Fastening.

The beautiful idea becomes a list of constraints.

What is visible?
What is hidden?
What holds it?
What feeds it?
What makes it grow?

This is where imagination becomes construction.

steps.label: Reality
steps.title: A new layer of home.
steps.meaning: LiveTile is the material result: a living wall system for fresh greens, light and home architecture. Order LiveTile on the official site.

cover.label: Live system
cover.title: Plants + Architecture
cover.meaning:
A living system that connects plants, architecture and people.

Greenery → Living Architecture

steps.label: Question
steps.title: Why does language learning feel like school?
steps.meaning: The question attacks the old frame: lessons, grammar, waiting for results.

steps.label: Feeling
steps.title: No result. No body. No pulse.
steps.meaning: The emotional truth is simple: people want progress they can feel.

steps.label: Image
steps.title: A gym for language.
steps.meaning: The image pulls language out of school and into training.

steps.label: Frame
steps.title: Learning becomes fitness.
steps.meaning: A new category appears: diagnosis, technique, rhythm, trainer, progress.

steps.label: Reality
steps.title: SpeakFit.
steps.meaning: A language product built like a fitness system.

steps.label: Question
steps.title: Why are people looking for predictions?
steps.meaning: The point is not prediction. It is the need to stop moving blindly.

steps.label: Feeling
steps.title: Uncertainty wants a shape.
steps.meaning: Under the request is a human wish for orientation.

steps.label: Image
steps.title: A navigation system for life.
steps.meaning: The image becomes navigation, not mysticism.

steps.label: Frame
steps.title: Astrology becomes clarity.
steps.meaning: The frame changes from fortune-telling to understanding.

steps.label: Reality
steps.title: Olga Tkachenko.
steps.meaning: A premium personal site around clarity, not esotericism.

steps.label: Question
steps.title: What if a radio station could become a place?
steps.meaning:
There was no hotel.
There was a station.

I was listening to SomaFM — Groove Salad, Drone Zone, Deep Space One, Lush.
Not as background music, but as a world with its own people, rhythm and atmosphere.

The question appeared before the brief:

What if this free frequency could become a place?
What if the people who live on this signal had a home in the physical world?

steps.label: Feeling
steps.title: The listener is tired of the masquerade.
steps.meaning:
The guest is not a tourist.
He is a digital professional, an audiophile, a design-conscious nomad — someone who has seen enough polished surfaces and social performance.

He does not need more entertainment.
He needs relief.

Coffee.
Sound.
Greenery.
A wall with a hand inside it.
A concrete bed with weight.
A room that does not ask him to perform.

A place where the nervous system exhales.

steps.label: Image
steps.title: A hotel as a physical radio station.
steps.meaning:
The image becomes clear:

Not rooms.
Stations.

Groove Salad is green, alive, elastic, morning.
Drone Zone is slow, dark, deep, inward.
Deep Space One is cosmic, blue, private, endless.
Lush is soft, human, atmospheric.

The guest does not choose standard or deluxe.
He chooses the frequency he wants to live in.

steps.label: Frame
steps.title: The frequency becomes rules.
steps.meaning:
Now the frequency has to become a hotel system.

4 or 9 rooms.
Closed territory.
No outside traffic.
No random crowd.

Hand-applied plaster walls.
Gradient color.
Polished concrete beds.
Marshall sound in every room.
SomaFM as the room setting.
Healthy breakfasts without fake wellness.
Coffee, plants, warm light, personal care.

A quiet concrete sanctuary with one bright Groove Salad stripe — a sign that you are on the right frequency.

steps.label: Reality
steps.title: A free frequency becomes a private neo-nomad hotel.
steps.meaning:
SOMA Family Hotel is a private boutique sanctuary for new global nomads, audiophiles and design-conscious travelers.

It was not adapted from an existing hotel.
It was imagined from listening.

A free radio frequency became a physical world: name, audience, atmosphere, rooms, material logic, sound ritual, breakfast culture and commercial story.

Not a hotel with music.
A place for people who live on the same frequency.

cover.label: Concept
cover.title: Free Frequency → Private Neo-Nomad Hotel
cover.meaning:
I was listening to a station.
Then I imagined a hotel for the people who live on that frequency.

A free SomaFM feeling became a private boutique sanctuary for digital nomads, audiophiles and people tired of noise.

steps.label: Было
steps.title: Хорошее место. Плохая цифра.
steps.meaning:
У заведения может быть сильный продукт, красивое место и постоянные гости.

Но в цифре всё выглядит как складская таблица: сырые названия, нет нормальной структуры, нет описаний, нет фотографий, нет желания выбирать.

steps.label: Разбор
steps.title: Сначала не дизайн.
steps.meaning:
Сначала нужно понять, что вообще продаётся.

Какие есть типы товаров. Какие поля нужны. Как они связаны. Как искать, фильтровать, выбирать и покупать.

steps.label: Сборка
steps.title: База становится магазином.
steps.meaning:
Старая товарная масса превращается в рабочий e-commerce.

Таблицы. Скрипты. WooCommerce. Атрибуты. Карточки. Фильтры. Страницы. Checkout.

steps.label: Атмосфера
steps.title: Магазин должен звучать как клуб.
steps.meaning:
Cистема заработала, её пора переодеть.

Не нарисовать красивую картинку, а надеть новый премиальный костюм на существующий сайт: страницы, карточки, фильтры, отступы, цвета - максимальное внимание к деталям.

steps.label: Результат
steps.title: Магазин стал частью клуба.
steps.meaning: Рабочий магазин, который не выглядит отдельно от места. Товары, атмосфера, выбор и покупка собраны в одну премиальную систему. Приходите в клуб посмотреть и отдохнуть.

cover.label: Кейс
cover.title: Raw Inventory → Premium Club Store
cover.meaning: Сырая товарная база стала рабочим премиальным магазином — а затем цифровым продолжением клуба.
